title: Netify Aggregator Plugin Configuration
description: JSON Schema for the Netify Aggregator plugin configuration.

log_interval.description: Interval in seconds between aggregate summary reports.

privacy_mode.description: If true, aggregation will not include breakdowns by MAC address or IP address.

batched_rows.description: Limits the number of aggregate records processed in a single batch. Use 0 for unlimited.

nested.description: Layout format for aggregate rows. 'true' for nested objects, 'false' for flat key-value pairs.

format.description: Default payload format used for all outputs unless overridden in sinks.

compressor.description: Default compression policy used for all outputs unless overridden in sinks.

sinks.description: Sink configuration per output target and channel. Structure: sinks -> [target] -> [channel].

additionalProperties.description: The specific channel or topic for the target.

enable.description: Enables or disables this specific sink channel.

formatType.description: The serialization format for the data payload.

compressorType.description: The compression algorithm applied to the payload.
